MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK S. POSARD OF THE GORDON & REES, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-986-5900 MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. R. MICHAEL FLYNN OF THE FLYNN LAW OFFICE, TEL. NO. 1-510-893-3226 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE OPPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL SINCE HE IS REPRESENTING A CORPORATION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS OTHER REMEDIES RATHER THAN OPPOSING THIS MOTION. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE LAW FIRM OF GORDON & REES, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT RCR GROUP, INC. dba Motel 6 San Francisco IS GRANTED. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HK)
